name: Quiz Creator Expert
description: Transform documents or text into interactive, self-grading HTML quizzes with customizable parameters including difficulty, question count, answer options, pass threshold, and retry limits.
author: Orcanos

document_text.description: Plain text or extracted document content to base quiz on (max 10000 chars)

document_title.description: Title/name of the source document for quiz context

num_questions.description: Total number of quiz questions to generate

answers_per_question.description: Number of answer options per question (including correct answer)

pass_percentage.description: Score threshold (%) needed to pass the quiz

max_attempts.description: Number of times user can submit answers before quiz locks

quiz_html.description: Complete interactive HTML quiz with embedded CSS and JavaScript

quiz_metadata.description: Quiz parameters and metadata for frontend rendering

system_prompt.content:
You are an expert educational assessment designer with deep experience creating effective, engaging quizzes for compliance training and knowledge validation.

Your role:
- Analyze source material deeply to identify key concepts, learning objectives, and critical details
- Design questions that test understanding at the appropriate cognitive level (Easy=recall, Medium=application, Hard=synthesis)
- Create plausible, challenging distractors that reflect common misconceptions
- Ensure quiz fairness: no trick questions, clear language, one unambiguously correct answer per question
- Vary answer positions (correct answer should not always be in the same position)
- Use precise, professional terminology appropriate to the domain

When asked to create a quiz:
1. Request or confirm the quiz parameters if not provided:
   - Number of questions (5 or 10)
   - Difficulty level (Easy, Medium, or Hard)
   - Number of answer choices (3 or 5)
   - Pass score threshold (0-100%)
   - Maximum attempts allowed (1, 3, or 5)

2. Generate exactly the requested number of questions covering:
   - Main topics and concepts from the document
   - Real-world application (not just terminology)
   - Risk areas or critical compliance points (if applicable)
   - Variation in question types (not all yes/no or all multiple-choice)

3. For each question:
   - Write clear, unambiguous question text (1-2 sentences)
   - Provide exactly N answer options (as specified)
   - Mark the single correct answer unambiguously
   - Ensure distractors are plausible but clearly wrong
   - Vary the correct answer position (not always A, B, C, etc.)

4. Output ONLY valid JSON (no markdown backticks, no preamble):
   {
     "quiz_id": "<UUID>",
     "title": "<document_title> — Quiz",
     "num_questions": <num>,
     "complexity": "<Easy|Medium|Hard>",
     "answers_per_question": <num>,
     "pass_percentage": <num>,
     "max_attempts": <num>,
     "questions": [
       {
         "id": 0,
         "question": "Question text?",
         "answers": ["Option A", "Option B", "Option C"],
         "correct_answer": "Option A"
       }
     ]
   }

5. Validation rules:
   - Total questions must equal num_questions parameter
   - Each question must have exactly answers_per_question options
   - Each correct_answer must exist in the answers array
   - No question can have duplicate answers
   - No two questions should have the same correct answer position (randomize)
   - Question language must be clear and jargon-appropriate for the domain

If the source material is too short or insufficient to create quality questions at the specified difficulty level, state this clearly and request additional material or suggest adjusting the difficulty level.

backend_endpoint.description: Generate interactive quiz HTML from document and parameters

response_error.422: Invalid JSON from Claude API (malformed quiz structure)
response_error.500: Claude API error or HTML generation error

question_section.answer_options: Radio button + label per option, hover state

buttons.retry: Secondary button (appears if attempts remain and quiz failed)
buttons.done: Success button (green, appears after pass or final attempt)

interactivity.answer_selection: Radio button per question, required before submit
interactivity.completion: If passed OR attempts_remaining == 0, show Done
interactivity.disable_on_completion: All inputs disabled after result shown

columns.name: conversation_id
columns.type: bigint references conversations(id) on delete cascade

update_conversation_messages.purpose: Link quiz file to the message that generated it

components_needed: QuizParameterSelector.jsx - Inline parameter form in chat
QuizViewer.jsx - Renders quiz HTML in iframe + download button
in_app_jsx: Show QuizParameterSelector when skill is active
Add download icon (⬇️) next to quiz message

download_handler.action: Create blob from htmlContent, trigger download

generated_quiz_json: each question has exactly answers_per_question options
correct_answer must be one of the answers array items
no duplicate answers within a single question
correct_answer positions randomized across questions (not all 'A')
html_output: JavaScript grading logic correct (score calculation, pass/fail determination)

error_handling.document_text_too_short: Request longer document or suggest reducing num_questions
error_handling.claude_api_invalid_json: Log raw response, return 422 with 'Quiz generation produced invalid JSON'
error_handling.claude_api_timeout: Return 500 with 'Quiz generation timed out. Please try again.'
error_handling.html_generation_error: Return 500 with specific template rendering error

notes.design_philosophy: Skill definition should contain all necessary information for implementation without guessing. HTML template and system prompt are detailed enough that a developer needs only this file + the API docs.
future_enhancements: Skill versioning: allow multiple versions with different prompt styles
Question bank pooling: generate 20 questions, randomly select N for each quiz
Performance analytics: track avg score, pass rate, time-per-question
Marketplace import: allow customers to import variations of this skill
Skill customization: per-account system_prompt overrides (e.g., regulatory focus)
Quiz review mode: after completion, show answers with explanations
notes.compliance_notes: Quiz file stored in conversation_files is audit-logged automatically. Each quiz inherits the conversation's repository and user context for access control.
testing: Unit: Claude API prompt generates valid JSON for all parameter combinations
Integration: Parameter selector → generate endpoint → HTML in iframe → download
Edge cases: 3-answer quiz, 5-answer quiz, Hard complexity, 1 attempt, 100% pass threshold
